e.match(k)||[]}},e50df6e6:(e,t,n)=>{var t=Array.isArray;e.exports=t},"80695cb0":e=>{e.exports=function(e){return null!=e&&"object"==typeof e}},"35c78023":(e,t,n)=>{var o=n("4d8dc546"),r=n("80695cb0");e.exports=function(e){return"symbol"==typeof e||r(e)&&"[object Symbol]"==o(e)}},"6fced440":(e,t,n)=>{var o=n("839063f1")((function(e,t,n){return e+(n?"-":"")+t.toLowerCase()}));e.exports=o},"8e12dc03":(e,t,n)=>{var o=n("11eb2663");e.exports=function(e){return null==e?"":o(e)}},"76a7ae57":(e,t,n)=>{var o=n("c7cfd73d"),r=n("2ad954b5"),a=n("8e12dc03"),i=n("deea960f");e.exports=function(e,t,n){return e=a(e),void 0===(t=n?void 0:t)?r(e)?i(e):o(e):e.match(t)||[]}}}]);
//# sourceMappingURL=https://istatic.booking.com/internal-static/capla/static/js/349461af.ec942272.chunk.js.map
